10-13c 40-44c 52-55c 94-98c 129-132c 198-203c 239-242c 293-295c 348-352c 382-386c 436-439c 476-479i 515-518c 554-560c 603-607c 630-633c 671-674c 688-690i 717-721c 760-765c 812-818c 859-863c 924-929c 981-985c 1036-1040c 1086-1090c 1118-1123c 1185-1188c 1216-1220c 1255-1260c 1305-1309c 1347-1351c 1406-1410c 1438-1441c 1456-1460c 1480-1484c 1492-1496c 1522-1526c  1568-1572c 1639-1642c 1716-1720c 1768-1772c 1822-1825c 1842-1846c
